events.label: reasoning
events.text: Non-IC can in contact with insulation is a fire hazard and violates NEC 410 requirements. Non-IC recessed luminaires must maintain clearance from insulation.

  "findings": [
    "Non-IC rated recessed can is in direct contact with thermal insulation, creating a fire hazard",
    "Installation violates NEC 410 requirements for clearance around non-IC luminaires"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize and remove or replace the non-IC can with an IC-rated fixture approved for insulation contact",
    "Maintain required clearance from insulation if a non-IC fixture must be used",
    "Re-inspect after correction before closing out the rough-in"
  ],
  "rationale": "A non-IC recessed luminaire in contact with insulation is a fire hazard and non-compliant with NEC 410, which requires IC-rated luminaires where insulation contact occurs or mandated clearance for non-IC fixtures.",
